steps.title: Find the intercept value
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. At that input, each factor of $2^x$ becomes $1$, so the function value is the sum of the coefficients.
$$f(0)=22(2)^0+8(2)^0=22+8=30$$

steps.title: Combine the terms
steps.content:
The original terms have the same exponential factor, $(2)^x$. Because the factors match, combine the coefficients while keeping the same base and exponent.
$$22(2)^x+8(2)^x=30(2)^x$$

steps.title: Match the displayed coefficient
steps.content: The equivalent form that displays the $y$-intercept value $30$ as a coefficient is $f(x)=30(2)^x$. The answer is D.
